breedimp_ancestor_outside_actor_dynasty_trigger = {
	trigger_if = {
		limit = { is_lowborn = yes }
		always = yes
	}
	trigger_else = {
		dynasty != scope:actor.dynasty
	}
}

breedimp_recipient_has_blood_impurity_trigger = {
	OR = {
		has_trait = bastard
		has_trait = legitimized_bastard
		any_parent = {
			even_if_dead = yes
			breedimp_ancestor_outside_actor_dynasty_trigger = yes
		}
	}
}

breedimp_can_exile_dynasty_member = {
	scope:actor = {
		is_ai = no
		is_alive = yes
		is_dynast = yes
	}

	is_ai = yes
	is_alive = yes
	is_lowborn = no
	dynasty = scope:actor.dynasty
	this != scope:actor
	NOT = { is_house_head = yes }
	NOT = { is_dynast = yes }
}
